items.title: A new way to create a digital wardrobe from your Google Photos
items.content: A new Google Photos feature catalogs the clothes in your wardrobe from your library.
items.contentSnippet: A new Google Photos feature catalogs the clothes in your wardrobe from your library.
items.summary: 谷歌相册新增功能可自动整理用户衣橱中的衣物，从相册库中分类记录。

items.title: You can now easily generate files in Gemini.
items.content: Move from a brainstorm to a polished document, sheet or PDF with a single prompt in Gemini.
items.contentSnippet: Move from a brainstorm to a polished document, sheet or PDF with a single prompt in Gemini.
items.summary: Gemini现在可以轻松生成文件。通过一个提示，用户可以将创意构思快速转换为精美的文档、表格或PDF文件。

items.title: Enjoy new ways to create, search and stream on Google TV
items.content: Google TV adds tools to create fun images and videos, fresh ways to showcase Google Photos — and soon a new row to stream short videos.
items.contentSnippet: Google TV adds tools to create fun images and videos, fresh ways to showcase Google Photos — and soon a new row to stream short videos.
items.summary: Google TV新增创意工具，支持制作图片和视频，优化Google Photos展示方式，并计划增加短视频流媒体专区，为用户带来更多创作、搜索和观看体验。

items.title: Gemini launches new personalisation features in the UK
items.content: Our vision for Gemini is to build an assistant that truly understands you—one that evolves with your needs rather than providing one-size-fits-all responses. Today, we’r…
items.contentSnippet: Our vision for Gemini is to build an assistant that truly understands you—one that evolves with your needs rather than providing one-size-fits-all responses. Today, we’r…
items.summary: Gemini在英国推出新的个性化功能，旨在打造一个能真正理解用户的助手，使其随用户需求演变而非提供千篇一律的回答。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.content: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.contentSnippet: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.summary: 谷歌为庆祝翻译官20周年，分享了20个趣味事实。从2006年的AI实验起步，如今支持近250种语言。文章还介绍了实用技巧和新增功能，回顾其发展历程。

items.title: We're announcing the first West Memphis Energy Impact Fund recipients.
items.content: The West Memphis Energy Impact Fund announced its first grant recipients, kicking off a $25 million commitment to energy efficiency in Greater West Memphis and Crittende…
items.contentSnippet: The West Memphis Energy Impact Fund announced its first grant recipients, kicking off a $25 million commitment to energy efficiency in Greater West Memphis and Crittende…
items.summary: 西孟菲斯能源影响基金宣布首批资助对象，启动对大西孟菲斯和克里滕登地区的能源效率提升计划，承诺投入2500万美元。

items.title: We’re donating Agent Payments Protocol to the FIDO Alliance to support the future of secure, agentic payments.
items.content: Google donates the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) to the FIDO Alliance to help secure the evolution of AI-driven commerce.
items.contentSnippet: Google donates the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) to the FIDO Alliance to help secure the evolution of AI-driven commerce.
items.summary: 谷歌向FIDO联盟捐赠了代理支付协议（AP2），以支持AI驱动商业的未来发展，并保障其安全演进。此举旨在推动安全、智能支付生态的进步，促进相关技术的标准化和开放合作。

items.title: Expanding digital IDs in India and around the world
items.content: Consumers in India can now save their Aadhaar Verifiable Credentials in Google Wallet and digital IDs expand to more countries.
items.contentSnippet: Consumers in India can now save their Aadhaar Verifiable Credentials in Google Wallet and digital IDs expand to more countries.
items.summary: 印度用户可将Aadhaar可验证凭证保存至Google钱包，数字身份系统扩展至更多国家。此举旨在提升数字身份应用的便捷性和安全性，促进跨境数据流通。

items.title: Join the new AI Agents Vibe Coding Course from Google and Kaggle
items.content: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.
items.contentSnippet: Google is bringing back its 5-Day AI Agents Intensive Course with Kaggle and registration is open.

name: Anant Nawalgaria
title: Group Product Manager, Founder of GenAI Intensive

items.summary: 谷歌与Kaggle联合推出为期五天的AI Agents强化课程，现已开放报名。该课程旨在帮助学员深入了解AI代理技术，内容涵盖相关知识和实践应用。

items.title: Albertsons Media Collective brings retail signals to YouTube with Google’s Commerce Media Suite.
items.content: Supercharge performance across the shopper journey by connecting Albertsons data with Google’s AI and scale.
items.contentSnippet: Supercharge performance across the shopper journey by connecting Albertsons data with Google’s AI and scale.
items.summary: Albertsons Media Collective通过将自身数据与Google的AI和规模相结合，利用Google的Commerce Media Suite将零售信号带到YouTube，旨在提升购物者旅程中的整体表现。

items.title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
items.content: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
items.contentSnippet: Organize your home and digital space with Gemini. Use AI-powered tips for cleaning schedules, inbox decluttering, seasonal chores.
items.summary: 使用Gemini AI优化家居和数字空间。通过AI提供的清洁计划、收件箱整理、季节性任务等建议，有效组织生活空间。

items.title: 7 highlights from Google Cloud Next ‘26
items.content: Catch up on our biggest updates from this year’s Cloud Next, including Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and our newest TPUs.
items.contentSnippet: Catch up on our biggest updates from this year’s Cloud Next, including Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and our newest TPUs.
items.summary: 文章介绍了Google Cloud Next '26大会的七项重要更新，包括Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform和最新推出的TPU。

items.title: Find out what’s new in the Gemini app in April's Gemini Drop.
items.content: Gemini Drops is our regular monthly update on how to get the most out of the Gemini app.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini Drops is our regular monthly update on how to get the most out of the Gemini app.
items.summary: Gemini Drops是Gemini应用每月更新的内容，旨在提供使用该应用的最新信息。

items.title: There's a new playbook for partnering with creators on marketing campaigns.
items.content: How Google is building tools to make creator partnerships accessible and effective.
items.contentSnippet: How Google is building tools to make creator partnerships accessible and effective.
items.summary: 谷歌正开发工具，旨在使创作者营销合作更易实现和高效。此举旨在提升合作的可及性，确保营销活动效果。

items.title: Fitbit's personal health coach is now even more personalized.
items.content: With these updates, it’s even easier to chat with your Coach and tailor workouts to suit your specific health goals.
items.contentSnippet: With these updates, it’s even easier to chat with your Coach and tailor workouts to suit your specific health goals.
items.summary: Fitbit的个人健康教练现已更加个性化。通过更新，用户可以更轻松地与教练沟通，并根据自身健康目标定制锻炼计划。

items.title: 3 easy ways to shop for spring with Google
items.content: Here are three Google Search and Shopping tools that can help you shop for spring fashion.
items.contentSnippet: Here are three Google Search and Shopping tools that can help you shop for spring fashion.
items.summary: 文章介绍了三种谷歌搜索和购物工具，帮助用户选购春季时尚。这些工具可简化购物流程，提供便捷的搜索和比价功能，方便用户找到心仪的春季商品。

items.title: Capris, bright makeup and more trending spring style searches
items.content: Take a look at Google’s trending fashion and beauty searches for spring 2026, including capris, blue mascara, French tips and more.
items.contentSnippet: Take a look at Google’s trending fashion and beauty searches for spring 2026, including capris, blue mascara, French tips and more.
items.summary: 根据谷歌2026年春季时尚和美妆搜索趋势，卡普里裤、亮色妆容、蓝眼线笔、法式指甲等成为热门。这些搜索反映了春季流行风格的偏好。

items.title: Convert faster on YouTube with April’s Demand Gen Drop.
items.content: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.
items.contentSnippet: Learn more about our latest Demand Gen Drop and ways to maximize campaign performance in Demand Gen campaigns.

标题：用四月需求生成工具提升YouTube转化率。

摘要：了解最新需求生成工具，掌握最大化需求生成活动表现的方法。

items.title: 3 creative tips from our Flow Sessions artists
items.content: Learn more about Google’s Flow Sessions, an artist cohort focusing on using AI in film while also using Google’s AI filmmaking tool, Flow.
items.contentSnippet: Learn more about Google’s Flow Sessions, an artist cohort focusing on using AI in film while also using Google’s AI filmmaking tool, Flow.
items.summary: 谷歌Flow Sessions是一个艺术家群体项目，专注于利用AI进行电影创作，并使用谷歌的AI电影制作工具Flow。该项目为参与者提供创意技巧和经验分享，旨在推动AI在影视领域的应用。

items.title: Here’s how our TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads.
items.content: Learn how Google’s TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads with this new video.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how Google’s TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads with this new video.
items.summary: 谷歌TPU通过新视频展示了其如何为日益增长的需求提供强大支持，助力AI工作负载。
